title: centrolepis cephaloformis
intro: Centrolepis cephaloformis, also known as the Cape daisy or New Zealand centrolepis, is a small, delicate flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centrolepis cephaloformis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Centrolepis cephaloformis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are typically used to treat a range of health issues.
